---
title: "ChIPSP: Core Integration of ChIP-seq and Hi-C Data"
author: "Tianyi Zhou"
package: ChIPSP
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{ChIPSP Workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
